ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bike_rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental record */,
  "dteday" TEXT /* Date of the rental */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season during which the rental occurred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the rental */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the rental */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the rental */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Whether the day was a holiday (0: No, 1: Yes) */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0: Sunday, 6: Saturday) */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Whether the day is a working day (0: No, 1: Yes) */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation (1: Clear, 2: Mist, etc.) */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Adjusted temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "hum" REAL /* Humidity level (percentage) */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "casual" INTEGER /* Number of casual users */,
  "registered" INTEGER /* Number of registered users */,
  "cnt" INTEGER /* Total count of rentals (casual + registered) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental location */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rental_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Payment amount for the rental */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, mobile wallet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_holiday FOREIGN KEY ("holiday") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_weathersit FOREIGN KEY ("weathersit") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weathersit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES rental_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weathersit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather situation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather situation (e.g., Clear, Misty) */,
  "weather_icon" TEXT /* URL or path to an icon representing the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weathersit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Winter, Spring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Casual, Registered) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of user registration */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the rental location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bikes the location can hold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_access_logs_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES bike_rentals ("rental_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each rental record

URL or path to an icon representing the weather condition

Unique identifier for each rental location
Maximum number of bikes the location can hold
Unique identifier for each access log entry
ID of the user accessing the data
